name: Pavlova
recipeIngredient: 12 teaspoons white vinegar or 3 teaspoons cream of tartar
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 250 degrees.
2. Grease and flour an 9-inch pie plate or line a baking sheet with parchment and draw a 9-inch circle using the plate as your guide.
3. Whip the egg whites until they hold stiff peaks.
4. Beat in the sugar, 1 teaspoon at a time, until the mixture is stiff and shiny.
5. Add the cornstarch, vinegar, and vanilla to the mixture.
6. Fill the plate with the meringue mixture, hollowing out the center slightly. Alternatively, mound the mixture in the center of the circle.
7. Spread the meringue out to cover the circle, then make a depression in the center.
8. Bake for 13 to 15 hours, or until the meringue is very lightly brown. Allow to cool slightly, then remove from the pan and let it cool completely. It may collapse slightly.
9. Just before serving, add sugar to taste to the whipped cream, add half the fruit, and fill the center of the Pavlova with it. Pile the remaining fruit on top.
Yield: 6 to 8 servings
